headline: Amazon, Corning sign multi-billion-dollar deal to boost fiber optics manufacturing in US
summary: Amazon said on Monday it has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with specialty glass ‌maker Corning aimed at boosting U.S. production ‌of optical fiber and connectivity products that are used in data ​centers.  Amazon, however, did not disclose any further financial details on the partnership.  Shares of Corning rose about 7% in early trading, as the partnership came as a fresh ‌boost to the ⁠company's fast-growing fiber optics unit, at a time when weak consumer electronics demand has ⁠weighed on the segment that makes Gorilla glass.

content.title: Amazon, Corning sign multi-billion-dollar deal to boost fiber optics manufacturing in US
content.summary: Amazon said on Monday it has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with specialty glass ‌maker Corning aimed at boosting U.S. production ‌of optical fiber and connectivity products that are used in data ​centers.  Amazon, however, did not disclose any further financial details on the partnership.  Shares of Corning rose about 7% in early trading, as the partnership came as a fresh ‌boost to the ⁠company's fast-growing fiber optics unit, at a time when weak consumer electronics demand has ⁠weighed on the segment that makes Gorilla glass.

headline: UK competition watchdog launches probe into eBay's purchase of Depop
summary: The UK competition regulator on ‌Monday launched a ‌probe into eBay's $1.2 billion purchase ​of Gen Z-focused fashion resale platform Depop from Etsy. The deal was ‌announced ⁠earlier this year and is expected to ⁠help Etsy double down on its ​core handmade ​and ​vintage goods marketplace ‌in pursuit of a turnaround. The firm has been grappling with softer demand and strong competition ‌from online ​e-commerce platforms ​such ​as Amazon.

content.title: UK competition watchdog launches probe into eBay's purchase of Depop
content.summary: The UK competition regulator on ‌Monday launched a ‌probe into eBay's $1.2 billion purchase ​of Gen Z-focused fashion resale platform Depop from Etsy. The deal was ‌announced ⁠earlier this year and is expected to ⁠help Etsy double down on its ​core handmade ​and ​vintage goods marketplace ‌in pursuit of a turnaround. The firm has been grappling with softer demand and strong competition ‌from online ​e-commerce platforms ​such ​as Amazon.

headline: Amazon Says SES Requires TLS 1.2. Paubox Testing Shows It Doesn't.
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 08, 2026--Emails sent through Amazon Simple Email Service (SES) can be delivered in plaintext, readable by anyone in transit, and the sender never knows. New testing from Paubox found Amazon SES could deliver protected health information (PHI) in email even when encryption fails.

content.title: Amazon Says SES Requires TLS 1.2. Paubox Testing Shows It Doesn't.
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 08, 2026--Emails sent through Amazon Simple Email Service (SES) can be delivered in plaintext, readable by anyone in transit, and the sender never knows. New testing from Paubox found Amazon SES could deliver protected health information (PHI) in email even when encryption fails.

headline: SpaceX: The Problem With Starlink's Next 10 Million Users
summary: SpaceX is set to go public in a few days at a valuation north of $1.7 trillion. The satellite internet network has become SpaceX's primary profit engine, but it also carries some very real risks. Average revenue per user is falling, capital requirements remain heavy, and each new wave of customers appe
